free_text: Same data as in the main ref.
Spread 2-3 % for En>2 MeV, 6-10% for En<2MeV
2.54-cm diameter by 0.0127-cm thick disks of uranium
metal with an average weight of 1 g.
Low background proportional counter for beta
Gamma-spectrometer based on 80 cm3 Li-drifted Ge
detector with resolution 2.2 keV(FWHM) for 1.33 MeV
spectrometry of an irradiated uranium target or
chemical separation of a fission product (or group of
elements) followed by gamma-ray spectrometry or beta
Corrected for effects of secondary neutrons on fission
yields of masses that are strongly sensitive to
neutron energy and for small contribution by U-238
OG. Converted to lower case and 4-digit
year. #NSR and #doi added. STATUS, METHOD, SAMPLE,
ERR-ANALYS updated. 2-nd REF added. Sub004 added.
consideration of all known sources of random and
systematic error with the usual rules of error
ERR-T replaced by DATA-ERR. STATUS added.
consideration of all known sources of random and
systematic error with the usual rules of error
OG. ERR-T replaced by DATA-ERR. STATUS
